description_long: This bed features a simple, modern design with a rectangular wooden frame and a tall, flat headboard. The frame is finished in a rich brown color, giving it a sturdy and contemporary appearance. A bright red bedding layer covers the mattress, adding a bold contrast to the darker frame. At the head of the bed, a single, large white pillow is neatly placed, spanning the width of the mattress. The bed stands on four short, blocky legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The overall look is minimalistic, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or storage compartments.
description: A modern brown platform bed with a tall headboard, red bedding, and a large white pillow. The design is minimalistic and sturdy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall headboard, red bedding, and white pillow clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bed's low profile, thick frame, and the layered bedding and pillow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, flat headboard and the bed's blocky legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bed's length, frame thickness, and bedding arrangement.
